title: senecio inghamii
intro: Senecio inghamii, also known as Ingham's ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Senecio inghamii include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
